mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO order_address (order_no, receiver, phone, province, city, area, detail_address, creator, updater, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES
(#{item.orderNo}, #{item.receiver}, #{item.phone}, #{item.province}, #{item.city}, #{item.area}, #{item.detailAddress}, #{item.creator}, #{item.updater}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)

INSERT INTO order_address (order_no, receiver, phone, province, city, area, detail_address, creator, updater, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES
(#{item.orderNo}, #{item.receiver}, #{item.phone}, #{item.province}, #{item.city}, #{item.area}, #{item.detailAddress}, #{item.creator}, #{item.updater}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE receiver = VALUES(receiver), phone = VALUES(phone), province = VALUES(province), city = VALUES(city), area = VALUES(area), detail_address = VALUES(detail_address), updater = VALUES(updater), update_time = NOW()
